zh.lifeSummary: 當Elin Hansdotter Lydecke於1490年出生在瑞典諾波頓亞爾福斯波格時，她的父親Hans Lydecke31歲，母親Kerstin Henriksdotter Finckenberg32歲。她和Per Hermansson Fleming至少有1個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1543年1月20日在她的家鄉享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elin Hansdotter Lydecke于1490年出生在瑞典諾波頓亞爾福斯波格时，她的父亲Hans Lydecke31岁，母亲Kerstin Henriksdotter Finckenberg32岁。她和Per Hermansson Fleming至少有1个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于1543年1月20日在她的家乡享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lydecke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Luedecke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Rainer, Heinz, Monika, Rudi.
North German (Lüdecke): from a pet form of the personal name Ludolf (see Ludolph ) or Ludwig , formed with the diminutive suffix -ke. Compare Ludecke .

nameMeanings.name: Elin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Elen
meanings: form of Helen , now also used outside Wales. It is identical with the Welsh vocabulary word elen ‘nymph’, but this is unlikely to be the origin. It is found in Welsh texts from an early period as an equivalent of Helen, for example as the name of the mother of Constantine, finder of the True Cross.

historicEvents.title: The Russo-Swedish War
historicEvents.description: While in an alliance with Grand Prince Ivan III of Moscow, King Hans of Denmark and Norway invaded Sweden and was declared King of Sweden.

historicEvents.title: The Stockholm Bloodbath
historicEvents.description: A mass execution of Swedish nobles by Danish king Christian II is known as the Stockholm Bloodbath. Christian II invaded Sweden in 1519 and took hold of Stockholm in September 1520. Over 80 nobles were executed for heresy on November 8 and 9. The outrage from the executions led to the Swedish removal of support of the Kalmar Union.

historicEvents.title: Swedish War of Liberation
historicEvents.description: The Swedish War of Liberation was a civil war led by nobleman Gustav Vasa. As Christian II heard of the rebellion, he confronted Vasa's men, who won the battle at Brunbacks Ferry. Christian II was defeated by the Swedes in Stockholm and a truce was agreed upon. Vasa was given as a hostage as a show of good faith until the treaty was signed. The Danish King did not keep his word and Vasa was held as a prisoner for two years until his escape. A bounty was placed on Vasa's head. Vasa worked to inspire many to join his cause and lived under disguise until the Danes surrendered in 1525.

historicEvents.title: First Full Swedish Translation of the Bible
historicEvents.description: The first full Swedish translation of the Bible, known as the Gustav Bible, was completed by Olaus Petri and Laurentius Andreae and published in 1540.

en.lifeSummary: When Elin Hansdotter Lydecke was born in 1490, in Älvsborg, Norrbotten, Sweden, her father, Hans Lydecke, was 31 and her mother, Kerstin Henriksdotter Finckenberg, was 32. She had at least 1 son and 5 daughters with Per Hermansson Fleming. She died on 20 January 1543, in her hometown, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elin Hansdotter Lydecke est née en 1490, à Älvsborg, Norrbotten, Suède, son père, Hans Lydecke, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Kerstin Henriksdotter Finckenberg, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles avec Per Hermansson Fleming. Elle est décédée le 20 janvier 1543, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elin Hansdotter Lydecke 1490 in Älvsborg, Norrbotten, Schweden geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hans Lydecke 31 und ihre Mutter Kerstin Henriksdotter Finckenberg 32. Sie hatte mit Per Hermansson Fleming mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Januar 1543 im Alter von 53 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elin Hansdotter Lydecke è nata il nel 1490 nel Älvsborg, Norrbotten, Svezia, sua padre, Hans Lydecke, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Kerstin Henriksdotter Finckenberg, aveva 32 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie con Per Hermansson Fleming. Morì il 20 gennaio 1543, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elin Hansdotter Lydeckeが1490年にスウェーデンノルボッテンaルvスボルグで生まれた時，父Hans Lydeckeは31歳，母Kerstin Henriksdotter Finckenbergは32歳であった。彼女はPer Hermansson Flemingとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1543年1月20日に故郷で53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elin Hansdotter Lydecke(이)가 1490년 스웨덴 노르벗텐 a브스볼그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hans Lydecke(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Kerstin Henriksdotter Finckenberg(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Per Hermansson Fleming(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1543년 1월 20일 그녀의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elin Hansdotter Lydecke nasceu em 1490, em Älvsborg, Norrbotten, Suécia, seu pai, Hans Lydecke, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Kerstin Henriksdotter Finckenberg, tinha 32 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas com Per Hermansson Fleming. Ela faleceu em 20 de janeiro de 1543, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elin Hansdotter Lydecke родилась в 1490 г. в местности aлвсборг, норрботтен, Швеция, её отцу по имени Hans Lydecke было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Kerstin Henriksdotter Finckenberg, 32. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей от Per Hermansson Fleming. Она умерла 20 января 1543 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elin Hansdotter Lydecke nació en 1490, en Älvsborg, Norrbotten, Suecia, su papá, Hans Lydecke, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Kerstin Henriksdotter Finckenberg, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas con Per Hermansson Fleming. Murió el 20 de enero de 1543, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años.
